title: Tiny Hands, Big Hearts! Counting Numbers

scenes.narration: It's sunny and bright on a snowy hill. Lumi is playing with her friend, Pipsqueak.
scenes.image_prompt: A cheerful, fluffy yellow bird perched on top of a snowy mountain.

scenes.narration: Pipsqueak has some cookies and milk for snacks. Lumi wants to share. Let's clap together!
scenes.image_prompt: Lumi and Pipsqueak are sitting side by side, sharing a plate of food with big smiles.

scenes.narration: Counting numbers: 1 cookie, 2 cookies! See how many cookies you can count together.
scenes.image_prompt: A close-up of the two birds counting on their fingers and counting out loud.

scenes.narration: Pipsqueak counts to three. Lumi counts to four, showing more than Pipsqueak could do.
scenes.image_prompt: Lumi and Pipsqueak count on their fingers while holding hands, making a fun counting game.

scenes.narration: Pipsqueak tries harder. He counts to five more times than before.
scenes.image_prompt: A close-up of Pipsqueak and Lumi sitting on the snowy hill together, both trying different ways to count.

scenes.narration: Lumi thanks Pipsqueak for sharing his cookies. It's time to fly away.
scenes.image_prompt: Pipsqueak and Lumi are flying on their tiny wings, with a warm goodbye in the air.

_combo.activity: sharing a snack with a friend
